title: NadirAliOfficial/math-vision
summary: Draw math expressions in the air with your finger. Write = and the answer appears instantly. Powered by Groq AI + MediaPipe.

title: pypi-ahmad/domain-adapted-embedding-alignment
summary: Production-oriented local pipeline for domain-adapted embedding training and retrieval, RAG, and GraphRAG evaluation.

title: DeemonDuck/guestflow-ai
summary: Multi-agent hospitality workflow automation platform using FastAPI, RAG, Streamlit, SQLite, and local LLMs via Ollama.

title: docxology/template
summary: Production-grade scaffold for reproducible computational research — 10-stage DAG pipelines, ≥90% test coverage, cryptographic provenance (SHA-256 + steganographic PDF watermarking), multi-project workspace, AI-agent-ready with AGENTS.md / SKILL.md throughout.

title: NadirAliOfficial/linkedin-ai-commenter
summary: AI-powered LinkedIn comment assistant using local Ollama. Built by Team NAK.

title: 4DA-Systems/4DA
summary: Privacy-first developer intelligence — surfaces what matters from the noise

title: arrase/ollama-agent
summary: Ollama Agent is a powerful command-line tool (CLI and REPL) that allows you to interact with local AI models.

title: strikersam/autonomous-ai-agency
summary: Autonomous AI Agent Infrastructure Platform — OpenAI-compatible AI gateway with MCP support, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, observability, memory, RAG, AI workflows, and unified infrastructure for any LLM provider.

title: Baba01hacker666/dct-agent
summary: Multi-server AI agent supporting Ollama, OpenAI-compatible providers (DeepSeek, Qwen, Groq) & OpenRouter. Multi-agent squads, DAG orchestration, background tasks, vision, and autonomous coding tools.

title: knows-cloud/paperless-iq
summary: Open-source AI add-on for Paperless-NGX: automatic metadata & tagging, RAG document search, and automation with Ollama, Bedrock, Anthropic, and OpenAI

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: aliyevaladddin/AladdinAI
summary: AladdinAI: open-source BYOI (Bring Your Own Infrastructure) AI Agent platform. Connect your own VMs, NVIDIA NIM, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama — build and manage AI agents visually.

title: NadirAliOfficial/NAK-Assist
summary: AI-powered smart assistant for Android — Fiverr reply, improve, summarize, translate & more by Team NAK

title: adamskijow/Hearth
summary: Keep Ollama (and other local LLM runners) alive on a headless Mac. A menubar supervisor with auto-restart, liveness + readiness health checks, sleep prevention, and phone alerts.

title: oliver-kriska/scribe
summary: LLM-managed personal knowledge base. Auto-extracts from git repos, Claude Code sessions (via ccrider FTS5), and iMessage bookmarks. Cross-project, qmd-indexed, runs on cron

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: subzone/Agentctl
summary: MD-driven agent CLI for code, infrastructure, and automation. 6 providers, 8 tools, zero SDK dependencies.

title: Nimdy/jarvis-oracle-edition
summary: A local-first JARVIS-style cognitive architecture with memory, perception, self-reflection, and governed self-improvement.

title: itxkarthik/Personal-AI-Knowledge-Assistant
summary: Personal AI Knowledge Assistant is a self-hosted knowledge workspace for Markdown notes, document ingestion, relationship graphs, hybrid search, and local AI chat. The stack uses Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and optional Ollama models.

title: arnaudstdr/copain
summary: A self-hosted, French-speaking assistant designed to absorb mental load, not pile more on. Voice + chat + geofence, semantic memory, privacy-first, runs on a Raspberry Pi.
